name: Smoked Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Smoked turkey, skinned and cut into 2-inch julienne strips
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, Jarlsberg, grapes, and celery in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the Sherry Mayonnaise and toss gently but well. Season to taste with salt and pepper, then toss again.
3. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
4. Arrange the salad in serving portions and sprinkle with green peppercorns to taste.
Cooked, lightly smoked ham or chicken may be substituted for turkey.
